title: Mtara Vinram

{{Quote|When you arrive, take out their leaders. Then find proof that they are behind the smuggled spice and are attempting to incriminate the Diktat and his administration.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mack Jasper|Jasper]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" />}}
'''Mtara Vinram''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was a member of the [[Corellian Security Force]] before choosing to become a criminal.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Well, I must say that I am very impressed. You not only foiled the plot to discredit the Diktat, but defeated the Rogue CorSec commanders who were apparently behind the whole thing!|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mack Jasper|Jasper]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" />}}
Mtara Vinram was once a member of the [[Corellian Security Force]]. However, by the time following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], she was part of the group of CorSec troopers and agents who left CorSec in pursuit of a more criminal lifestyle. Along with [[Hiram Bish]], Mtara Vinram became one of the commanders of the [[Rogue CorSec]].<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> Bish and Vinram elaborated a plot to discredit the Diktat, [[Daclif Gallamby]], and his government.<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" /> As part of the plot, they created evidences that the Diktat himself was [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] illegal [[Spice/Legends|spice]] in the [[Coronet Capitol]]. The plot was finally foiled by a spacer recruited by CorSec [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mack Jasper]].<ref name="SWG:SOtGS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Seek Out the Gadget Specialist|Corellia}}</ref> The spacer infiltrated the [[Rogue CorSec Base]] to find proof of the Diktat's innocence. Mtara Vinram and Hiram Bish were killed during the assault.<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mtara Vinram appeared as a non-player character in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>

Mtara Vinram was added to the game with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> She was part of questline that featured the Rogue CorSec plot against the Diktat.<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" /> This story arc was later slightly revamped with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 27 Notes for February 15th, 2006|Publish 27]]," on [[February 15]], [[2006]],<ref name="SonyForumsCite-What's On Deck! Publish 28 Update Notes, April 26th">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=Announcements&message.id=3077&jump=true|text=What's On Deck! Publish 28 Update Notes, April 26th}}</ref> as the questline was integrated into the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]," the main questline in the game.<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" />
